# zendesk_brand (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk brand.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the brand.
- `subdomain` (String) The subdomain of the brand.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the brand is active.
- `brand_url` (String) The URL of the brand.
- `has_help_center` (Boolean) Whether the brand has a Help Center.
- `host_mapping` (String) The host mapping to this brand.
- `signature_template` (String) The signature template for the brand.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default brand for the account.
- `help_center_state` (String) The state of the Help Center (enabled, disabled, restricted).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_deleted` (Boolean) Whether the brand is deleted.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String) The API URL for this brand.
